name: axiom-rust-workspaces
description: Rust at workspace scope — multi-crate composition, not single-crate engineering. v1.0.0 marks API stability: router + 13 sheets, 3 commands, 1 agent. Covers workspace structure, `[workspace.dependencies]` + resolver-2/3, `[workspace.lints]` + workspace-scope `clippy.toml`, workspace-scope `deny.toml`, public-vs-internal crate boundaries, feature-unification gotchas, Miri on the unsafe-bearing subset, test organisation, rustdoc + mdbook architecture, release flow, task-runner patterns, workspace-scope coverage, and the workspace anti-pattern refusal list. Sibling to `axiom-rust-engineering` — that pack is single-crate-shaped; this pack composes those concerns at workspace scale.
